items.title: Website launched
items.description: Browse the survey companion, model explorer, evaluation matrix, and curated WSI resources online.

items.title: Structured data and paper tags updated
items.description: Core tables render from JSON, and curated papers now include task/topic tags with website filters.

items.title: Resources expanded
items.description: Toolboxes, datasets, and benchmarks are available as maintained WSI resource sections.

items.title: Curated papers online
items.description: Conference paper sections were added for tracking relevant WSI and pathology foundation model work.
